semantic.role: Vitest test suite for the ArchitectureDiagramRenderer module, verifying correct Mermaid diagram generation from ArchDiagramSpec inputs.
responsibilities: Validate that ArchitectureDiagramRenderer.render produces Mermaid markdown with correct title and subtitle.
Verify that all node types (frontend, backend, messagebus, database, external) are rendered with appropriate Mermaid style classes (e.g., frontend, backend, msgBus, db, external).
Ensure edges are correctly rendered with the expected arrow connectors and labels.
Test that the renderer can handle subgraphs (groups of nodes) and renders them with proper Mermaid subgraph syntax.
outOfScope: No production code definition; this file purely contains tests.
No public API surface for other modules to consume.
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts per rule 'test-file-suffix' (severity: error).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain regression coverage for the architecture diagram renderer across refactors.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Chore: apply release gate fixes and sync accumulated source changes — indicates the test file was updated in a maintenance cycle, likely to align with minor renderer changes.
